markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, production updates, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** Jason will review the topic list to build a holiday content buffer. Growth X is testing a new agentic pipeline to improve research and linking quality.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [**Production Fix:** Tables were replaced with text in live articles to fix a Webflow bug. This is now the standard format, as tables are not critical for current content types.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Performance Signals:** Early data shows growing impressions and good LLM engagement (position quality, sentiment). The low citation rate is expected for a new blog and will be a key metric to track.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Blog Hero:** Jason will manage the blog hero section, as it's a minor UI element for browsing users and has no direct SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build a content buffer for the holidays to ensure continuous publishing despite team time off.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Action:** Jason will review the topic list to streamline the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [**Option 1:** Approve a large batch of topics.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [**Option 2:** Flag irrelevant topics for removal.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This review helps Growth X plan future keyword research and maintain a relevant content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [**Pipeline Upgrade:** Growth X is testing a new agentic pipeline for content production, launching next week.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Expected Improvements:** Deeper, more accurate research; better contextual linking (internal & external); more nuanced product feature descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason to report any quality issues observed in next week's content.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Writing Guidelines:** Updated to prevent "overselling" or inventing non-existent features (e.g., for reporting/expense management).](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason to provide timely updates on new features to keep the "product context artifact" accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Table Fix:** Replaced tables with text in live articles to resolve a Webflow bug.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Decision:** This is now the standard format. Tables are not needed for current content types and are less user-friendly.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Bailey identified a bug in the blog post cohort setup and will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Early Signals:** Impressions are growing, and first clicks on new content are occurring.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**LLM Performance (via Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Engagement:** High.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Position Quality:** Improved over the last month.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Citation Rate:** Low (currently citing 3rd-party sources, not ottotheagent.com).](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This is normal for a new blog with a small, unindexed library. It will be a key metric to watch as the content library grows.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**New Feature (Beta):** Scrunch is testing a tool that finds relevant, high-intent prompts the blog isn't currently ranking for. This may inform future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Blog Hero Section Management

  - [**Context:** The Webflow blog page has a hero section controlled by a "hero toggle" on each article.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Decision:** Jason will manage the hero section.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It's a minor UI element for browsing users, not a primary SEO driver. It's best used for internal priorities (e.g., product announcements) or featuring top-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Review the content topic list to build a holiday buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Jason:** Provide timely updates on new product features to keep the "product context artifact" accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Jason:** Manage the blog hero section.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Growth X:** Investigate and fix the Looker dashboard cohort bug.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Growth X:** Launch the new agentic production pipeline next week.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Growth X:** Send 4 new articles for review by EOD Nov 7.](https://fathom.video/share/2N2uiLNyHsaVHNhWgsZa9zecgEJqtjky?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
